ValidationRule.description: To Check Entity is Inactive when SubInvoice is Created.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, RecordType.DeveloperName != 'Deferred Sub Invoice', leaseworks__Invoice_Deferred_From__c != Null, ISNEW(), leaseworks__Y_hidden_AccEnabled__c, leaseworks__Entity__r.leaseworks__Inactive__c)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Unable to proceed with transactions: The related invoice is associated with an inactive entity. Please ensure the entity is active to continue.
